opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My face is throbbing, hot, and constantly leaking pus. I couldn't sleep at all because it hurts to even rest my head on the pillow. (Mother on the call as well.)
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Some deep painful lumps on my cheeks blew up over the last two days and now they've burst and are weeping, and the skin around them is getting red — I'm scared it's turning into something serious.

symptom_narrative.onset: the deep lumps started swelling up about 48 hours ago; in the last 12 hours they got really tender and some burst and started leaking
symptom_narrative.duration: about two days and it feels worse today
symptom_narrative.character: deep, sore lumps on both cheeks that are hot and throbbing; a few have opened and are weeping yellow fluid; the skin around them looks red
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst my skin has ever felt — the pain kept me awake all night
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: both lower cheeks mostly, and I get spots on my forehead and upper back too
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant throbbing, worse when I lie on that side
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing much; the pain is there all the time
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: pressure on my face, lying on the pillow
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I feel a bit warm and worn out from no sleep, and really down about how my face looks
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had spots and blackheads on my face and upper back for a long time, with pimples that come and go, but never lumps this painful
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I've been staying home and avoiding people because of how it looks and how much it hurts

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: long-standing spots, blackheads and whiteheads on the face and upper back

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: an over-the-counter benzoyl peroxide 5% gel that I've been using on and off

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: young adult living with mother; been under a lot of stress recently and my skin has been oilier than usual

objective_data_offered.value: about 37.6 degrees on the home thermometer
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer; patient feels only mildly warm

objective_data_offered.value: grouped raised lumps on both lower cheeks, a couple opened and weeping yellowish fluid, with redness in the skin immediately around them; oily-looking skin with scattered small spots on the forehead
mother says the redness so far seems to sit close around the lumps rather than racing across the cheek, and that her daughter is tired and guarding her face but otherwise herself
